# Issue Title

Add an accessibility checklist for UI board skills

## Description

Create a reusable accessibility checklist that contributors can apply when creating or updating a skill preview.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Add a checklist covering contrast, focus states, disabled states, keyboard navigation, and reduced motion.
- [ ] Link the checklist from `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] Keep the guidance practical for static HTML/CSS previews.
- [ ] Avoid claiming formal accessibility certification.

## Suggested Labels

`accessibility`, `documentation`, `quality`
